
HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\MysteriumNode
    Type    REG_DWORD    0x10
    Start    REG_DWORD    0x3
    ErrorControl    REG_DWORD    0x1
    ImagePath    REG_EXPAND_SZ    C:\ProgramData\FryNetworks\miner-BM\nssm.exe
    DisplayName    REG_SZ    MysteriumNode
    ObjectName    REG_SZ    LocalSystem
    DelayedAutostart    REG_DWORD    0x0
    FailureActionsOnNonCrashFailures    REG_DWORD    0x1

HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\MysteriumNode\Parameters
EXIT=0
